_doc: CLOUD unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/sanctum. 58.18% unlocked / 41.82% × 1b = 418.2m CLOUD locked. DL event panel shows ongoing Team + Investors at daily linear rates starting Jul 17 2025 (2y term ending Jul 17 2027). Plus past cliffs Jul 18 2025 (large), Oct 17 2025, Jan 16 2025.

events.note: Team Ongoing 229,143 CLOUD/day × 730 days = 167.3m CLOUD. Aligns with Team 34.44% × 1b allocation minus already-vested portion.
Investors Ongoing 119,157 CLOUD/day × 730 days = 87m CLOUD. Aligns with Investors 17.91% × 1b.
Community Reserve follow-up estimated 15m based on prior Oct 17 2025 event pattern ($277K = 15m CLOUD).
